summary: Completed frontend testing of Email Templates page (/email-templates). All 6 email templates render correctly with preview and HTML code views. Template switching, toggle buttons, and copy functionality all working. Sidebar navigation to E-Mail Templates verified. Regression tests passed for all other pages.
passed_tests: Email Templates page loads at /email-templates with correct header 'E-Mail Templates'
Subtitle 'Vorschau und HTML-Code der E-Mail-Vorlagen' displayed
All 6 template buttons visible in left sidebar (Auftragsbestätigung, File fertig, Support-Übernahme, Credits gekauft, Rechnung, Willkommen)
Default template (Auftragsbestätigung) shows in preview iframe on page load
Preview card with iframe visible for template preview
Toggle buttons 'Vorschau' and 'HTML Code' visible and functional
Clicking 'HTML Code' button switches to code view with pre tag
HTML code view shows raw HTML content with <!DOCTYPE html>
Copy button ('Kopieren') visible only in code view
Copy button click works (changes to 'Kopiert!' - clipboard blocked in automation)
Switching back to 'Vorschau' hides copy button and shows preview
Clicking each template button switches the preview content correctly
Template 'File fertig' shows correct HTML content (Tuning-File ist bereit)
Template 'Willkommen' shows correct HTML content (Willkommen bei Chiptuningfile)
E-Mail Templates menu item visible in main sidebar navigation
Sidebar navigation to /email-templates works correctly
Regression: Dashboard (/) loads correctly
Regression: Credits page (/credits) loads correctly
Regression: New Order page (/new-order) loads correctly
Regression: Order Live page (/order-live) loads correctly
Regression: Configurator page (/configurator) loads correctly

mocked_apis_list: Email HTML templates are static strings hardcoded in EmailTemplates.jsx

context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Templates page fully tested. All 6 templates (order_confirm, file_ready, support_handling, credits_purchased, invoice, welcome) with preview iframe and HTML code view working. Copy button uses navigator.clipboard.writeText (may fail in automated testing due to permissions). Templates use inline CSS with portal colors (#8B2635 red, #1a1a1a dark backgrounds). Sidebar navigation verified.
